stages.title: Site Analysis
stages.narration: Stage 1. Site analysis. Bamboo structures require proper site drainage and foundation preparation to maximize durability.
stages.explanation: Bamboo structures require proper site drainage and foundation preparation to maximize durability.

stages.title: Setting Out
stages.narration: Stage 2. Setting out. Building grid and column positions are marked on site.
stages.explanation: Setting out establishes the exact structural geometry.

stages.title: Excavation
stages.narration: Stage 3. Foundation trenches are excavated to competent bearing soil.
stages.explanation: Excavation removes weak surface material and provides stable support.

stages.title: PCC and Foundation
stages.narration: Stage 4. Plain cement concrete, strip footings, and foundation beams distribute loads to the soil.
stages.explanation: Foundations distribute structural loads safely into the soil.

stages.title: Bamboo Treatment
stages.narration: Stage 5. Bamboo poles are treated against insects, fungi, and moisture before erection.
stages.explanation: Untreated bamboo deteriorates rapidly. Proper treatment protects against insects, fungi and moisture.

stages.title: Bamboo Column Erection
stages.narration: Stage 6. Treated bamboo columns are erected and anchored to the foundation beam.
stages.explanation: Columns provide the primary vertical load path.

stages.title: Bamboo Beam Installation
stages.narration: Stage 7. Horizontal bamboo beams connect columns and transfer roof loads.
stages.explanation: Bamboo beams transfer roof loads into columns.

stages.title: Cross Bracing System
stages.narration: Stage 8. Diagonal bamboo bracing is now installed. These members resist horizontal earthquake forces and significantly increase frame stability.
stages.explanation: Cross bracing prevents lateral sway during earthquakes.

stages.title: Bamboo Wall Frame
stages.narration: Stage 9. Secondary bamboo members complete the wall framing grid.
stages.explanation: The wall frame distributes loads and supports plaster skin.

stages.title: Wire Mesh Installation
stages.narration: Stage 10. Galvanized wire mesh is fixed to the bamboo frame across all wall panels.
stages.explanation: Wire mesh controls cracking and improves wall integrity.

stages.title: Cement Plaster Application
stages.narration: Stage 11. Cement mortar plaster is applied to create a stiff composite wall with the mesh and frame.
stages.explanation: Cement plaster creates a composite wall system with improved stiffness.

stages.title: Roof Truss Assembly
stages.narration: Stage 12. Triangulated bamboo roof trusses are assembled on the ground and lifted into place.
stages.explanation: Triangulated trusses efficiently transfer roof loads.

stages.title: Roof Installation
stages.narration: Stage 13. Lightweight CGI roofing sheets are installed on bamboo purlins.
stages.explanation: Lightweight roofing significantly reduces earthquake forces.

stages.title: Roof Anchorage
stages.narration: Stage 14. Roof anchors and tie-downs connect the roof diaphragm to the frame.
stages.explanation: Anchorage prevents roof uplift during high winds and earthquakes.

stages.title: Finishing Works
stages.narration: Stage 15. Doors, windows, floor finish, and protective coatings are completed.

stages.title: Completed Structure
stages.narration: Construction complete. The cement bamboo frame is a lightweight, ductile system well suited to seismic regions.
stages.explanation: Fully assembled treated bamboo frame with composite plaster walls and anchored lightweight roof.

foundation.title: Foundation System
foundation.purpose: Transfers gravity and lateral loads from frame to bearing soil.
foundation.loadTransfer: Strip footing and grade beam spread column reactions; PCC provides uniform bearing.

bamboo_column.title: Bamboo Column
bamboo_column.compressionBehavior: Hollow bamboo acts primarily in axial compression with slenderness limits.
bamboo_column.connectionDetails: Bolted or strapped base shoe to RC plinth; top pinned to beam with steel bracket.

bamboo_beam.title: Bamboo Beam
bamboo_beam.bendingBehavior: Double-pole or bundled bamboo resists bending under roof loads.

cross_bracing.title: Cross Bracing
cross_bracing.lateralResistance: Diagonals form trussed panel resisting racking deformation.
cross_bracing.earthquakePerformance: Reduces inter-storey drift and protects infill plaster from cracking.

wire_mesh.title: Wire Mesh
wire_mesh.crackControl: Mesh restrains shrinkage cracks in cement plaster.
wire_mesh.compositeAction: Mesh ties plaster skin to bamboo frame for in-plane shear transfer.

roof_truss.title: Roof Truss
roof_truss.forceDistribution: Top chord compression, bottom chord tension under gravity load.
roof_truss.triangulation: Triangulated geometry makes truss stable and determinate.

roof_anchorage.title: Roof Anchorage
roof_anchorage.upliftResistance: Straps and bolts resist wind and seismic uplift on lightweight CGI roof.
roof_anchorage.earthquakePerformance: Maintains roof diaphragm connection to wall frame during shaking.
